title: PVP set
description: PVP set with small swords. And other improvements.
body:
## Info

This project was created so that people wouldn't have to search for many different resource packs for PVP, but could download one resource pack that contains everything they need.

## What adds

this project adds better texture packs for PVP. In particular, he adds:

better sword,
better axe,
better bow
(That's all for now.)

video:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tb4c3yzhdIA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Why this project?

Because with this project it will be easier for beginners to learn and fight in PVP. Additionally, the textures in this project are easy to master. (They are a bit vanilla)
